allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['path']\) for f in data.get\('tree',[]\) if f['type']=='blob']")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:', p.get\('main'\)\); print\('types:', p.get\('types'\)\); print\('exports:', list\(p.get\('exports',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:5]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d.get\('name'\)\); print\('scripts:', list\(d.get\('scripts',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k not in \('dependencies','devDependencies','optionalDependencies'\)}, indent=2\)\)")
